title: Class 465, 466, 165 and 365 Networkers EMU Pack
description: All Of The Networkers (Networker, Networker Turbo And Networker Express) In Their Original Pre PRM State.
body:
All British Rail Networkers For MTR Mod
Made For MTR 3.2.2 However May Work With 4.0.0

WE ARE RELEASED BABY WOOOO!!!

Contains:

465/0 NSE BRUSH

465/0 CONNEX BRUSH

465/2 NSE METCAM

466/0 NSE METCAM

365/5 NSE METCAM OLD FRONT

365/5 NSE METCAM NEW FRONT

165/1 NSE DIESEL

Most Textures Supplied By DJhorse96 (Thank You!!)

Most Sounds Supplied By Curt (Thank You!!)

Bogies And Door Sounds Supplied By Navi (Thank You!!)
